name: jzills
description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for git workflows, .NET testing, and skill management.

plugins.name: conventional-commits
plugins.description: Enforces Conventional Commits message format and branch naming conventions when creating branches or committing.

plugins.name: dotnet-unit-tests
plugins.description: Writes production-quality NUnit + Moq unit tests for C# / .NET code.

plugins.name: github-pr
plugins.description: Creates GitHub pull requests using the gh CLI with auto-generated titles and descriptions.

plugins.name: skill-changelog
plugins.description: Maintains a versioned CHANGELOG.md inside any skill directory being created or modified.

plugins.name: auto-rewind
plugins.description: Detects test failures and guides a /rewind to a clean checkpoint instead of fixing forward.

plugins.name: shimmering-forest
plugins.description: CVSS v3.1-inspired risk auditor that scores every tool call and blocks or warns based on configurable severity thresholds.

plugins.name: semantic-versioning
plugins.description: Determines the next semantic version number by inspecting git tags, release branches, and commit history.

plugins.name: release-workflow
plugins.description: Orchestrates a full release workflow: version detection, release branch creation, CI monitoring, and PR creation.

plugins.name: dotnet-xml-docs
plugins.description: Writes and reviews XML documentation comments (///) for C# / .NET public APIs.
